hero.title: Voice Converter
hero.description: Turn typed text into browser-native speech previews without uploading text or generating audio files.

features.title: A private workspace for speech previews
features.description: Voice Converter V1 focuses on explicit user action, local session history, and browser-native speech playback.

items.title: Enter text
items.description: Paste or type text in a shared drawer before previewing speech.

items.title: Tune playback
items.description: Choose an available browser voice and adjust rate, pitch, and volume.

items.title: Save sessions locally
items.description: Keep speech session records in the current browser for replay and review.

flow.title: Write -> Preview -> Review
steps: Enter or paste text after an explicit user action
Select a browser voice and playback settings
Preview speech and save the session locally

benefits.title: Preview speech without external services
benefits.description: V1 gives users useful text-to-speech behavior while keeping text and audio processing inside the browser.

items.title: Privacy-first
items.description: Text is not uploaded, synced, or stored in backend services.

items.title: Lightweight
items.description: The app uses the native Speech Synthesis API instead of adding audio libraries or AI SDKs.

items.title: Easy review
items.description: History and Insights summarize saved sessions, character counts, voices, and recent activity.

differences.title: Designed for browser-local voice previews
differences.description: Voice Converter avoids cloud TTS integrations in V1 and keeps every playback action user-triggered.

items.title: Write
items.description: Add text manually in the protected workspace.

items.title: Preview
items.description: Use browser speech synthesis to hear the selected voice and settings.

items.title: Review
items.description: Search, replay, delete, clear, and inspect local session stats.

feel.title: Immediate, local, and controlled
feel.description: The workflow keeps speech conversion simple while making privacy boundaries visible.

items.title: No background reading
items.description: The app speaks only after the user previews or replays a saved session.

items.title: Clear settings
items.description: Each saved session keeps the voice, language, rate, pitch, volume, and character count.

items.title: Graceful fallback
items.description: Browsers without Speech Synthesis can still save and review local sessions.

useCases.title: Useful for quick speech checks
useCases.description: Voice Converter is best for local previews when users want to hear text aloud without creating audio files.

items.title: Writing review
items.description: Listen to drafted text to catch rhythm, length, or wording issues.

items.title: Accessibility checks
items.description: Preview how text sounds with available browser voices.

items.title: Practice scripts
items.description: Replay short scripts or notes while keeping sessions local.

audiences.title: Who uses Voice Converter
audiences.description: Helpful for people who need lightweight speech playback inside the browser.

items.title: Writers
items.description: Hear text aloud while revising drafts.

items.title: Students
items.description: Replay study notes or short scripts in available browser voices.

items.title: Privacy-conscious users
items.description: Avoid cloud speech providers for simple text-to-speech previews.

resourceSection.title: Voice Converter essentials
resourceSection.description: The V1 workflow stays small, private, and browser-native.

items.title: Workspace
items.description: Add text, choose a voice, tune settings, preview speech, and save sessions.

items.title: History
items.description: Search, replay, delete, and clear browser-local sessions.

items.title: Insights
items.description: Review total sessions, total characters, average length, most-used voice, and recent activity.

groupedSection.title: Convert text to speech without backend storage
groupedSection.description: Move from manual text entry to local playback and review.

items.name: Manual text
items.description: Paste or type text only after opening the workspace drawer.

items.name: Voice controls
items.description: Pick an available voice and set rate, pitch, and volume.

items.name: Replay
items.description: Use Speech Synthesis again for saved sessions.

items.name: Cleanup
items.description: Delete individual sessions or clear all local history.

technicalSection.title: Browser-local V1 implementation
technicalSection.description: Voice Converter follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture while avoiding backend speech persistence.
items: Zustand app-local state with browser localStorage persistence.
Native Speech Synthesis only; no cloud TTS providers, AI SDKs, audio blobs, downloads, or backend text storage.

items.question: Does Voice Converter upload my text?
items.answer: No. V1 keeps text in the browser and does not send it to backend services.

items.question: Does it create audio files?
items.answer: No. V1 uses browser speech playback only and does not generate or cache audio blobs.

items.question: What is stored locally?
items.answer: Saved sessions store title, text, selected voice, language, rate, pitch, volume, character count, and creation time in the current browser.

finalCta.title: Open Voice Converter
finalCta.description: Preview speech locally with your browser's built-in voices.
